positive: A whimsical, hyper-detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest clearing. Giant glowing mushrooms, floating fireflies, and ancient, moss-covered roots create a magical, ethereal atmosphere. Style: Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, rendered in deep emerald, sapphire, and gold tones. Full view, highly intricate, cinematic lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, noise
